name: OpenAI
description: Access OpenAI's language models to generate text, answer questions, and create embeddings — all via the official REST API.

auth.hint: Create an API key in your OpenAI account settings.

tools.name: chat_completion
tools.description: Send a message to a GPT model and get a response. Supports system prompts and conversation history.

params.name: model
params.description: Model ID, e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, or gpt-3.5-turbo

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List all available OpenAI models with their IDs and creation dates.

tools.name: create_embedding
tools.description: Convert text into a numerical vector (embedding) useful for semantic search and similarity.

params.name: input
params.description: Text to convert to an embedding
